Completed canonical URL normalization across public docs, install/release scripts, package metadata, website docs, and generated references. Kept Go module install/import paths on github.com/steveyegge/beads. Validated with residual URL scans, git diff --check, bash -n for touched shell scripts, and node --check for npm postinstall.

Added scripts/check-release-consistency.sh and wired it into CI plus the release workflow before GoReleaser publishes. The gate validates package versions, canonical GitHub URLs, Go module install snippet ownership, install/release endpoints, npm/PyPI/winget metadata, and GoReleaser release metadata. Validated with make check-release, bash -n, and git diff --check; actionlint was not installed locally.

Added a Refactoring Campaign PR Intake Checklist to CONTRIBUTING.md near the contributor protection policy. The checklist covers overlap review, clean-merge preference, rebase requests, preserving contributor tests and intent, closing superseded PRs with explicit rationale, and leaving an audit trail. Validated with git diff --check.

Phase 4 complete: normalized canonical repository URLs across docs/packages/scripts, added release-blocking consistency checks to CI and the release workflow, and documented contributor PR intake for refactoring work. All three child tasks are closed and pushed.
